name: Spotify
longDescription:
Spotify is a music and podcast streaming service with a catalog of tens of millions of tracks from major labels and independent artists. Listeners can search by song, album, artist, or genre, build their own playlists, and follow other users and curators.

Its recommendation engine powers personalized playlists like Discover Weekly, Release Radar, and Daily Mixes, plus algorithmic radio stations that adapt to your listening history. Beyond music, Spotify hosts podcasts, audiobooks in select markets, and exclusive shows.

A free ad-supported tier offers shuffled mobile playback, while Premium plans add on-demand listening, offline downloads, and higher audio quality. Spotify Connect ties the app to speakers, TVs, cars, and game consoles so playback can move between devices without losing the queue.

features.title: Massive music catalog
features.description: Tens of millions of tracks span major-label releases, indie artists, and back catalogs in most genres.

features.title: Personalized playlists
features.description: Discover Weekly, Release Radar, and Daily Mixes update automatically based on what you listen to.

features.title: Podcasts and audiobooks
features.description: Spotify hosts a large podcast library and audiobook catalog in supported countries.

features.title: Spotify Connect
features.description: Stream from the app to speakers, TVs, consoles, and cars while keeping playback synced across devices.

features.title: Collaborative playlists
features.description: Multiple users can edit the same playlist together, with Blend mixing several friends' tastes.

useCases: Listening to music and podcasts at home, in the car, or on the go
Discovering new artists through algorithmic and editorial playlists
Building shared playlists with friends or for parties
Following favorite artists for new release notifications
Casting music to speakers, TVs, and consoles via Spotify Connect

faq.question: Is Spotify free?
faq.answer: Yes, a free ad-supported tier is available, while Premium subscriptions add ad-free playback, offline downloads, and higher quality audio.

faq.question: Can I listen offline?
faq.answer: Premium subscribers can download playlists, albums, and podcasts for offline playback on mobile and desktop.

faq.question: What audio quality does Spotify offer?
faq.answer: Free users stream up to 160 kbps, while Premium streams up to 320 kbps with various quality presets in settings.

faq.question: Can I use Spotify on multiple devices?
faq.answer: One account works across all your devices, but only one can play music at a time on individual plans.
